name: ascs
description: Agent Session Control Stack — assemble the reference stack in two commands. Upstream plugins install directly from their original authors' repositories: nothing here is bundled, forked, or rebranded. Credits and reasoning: ATTRIBUTION.md in this repository.

plugins.name: session-health
plugins.description: Health Detection layer — closed-loop hot-session detection that lets the model itself propose /compact, a fresh session, or subagent delegation. The stack's single compact decider. By House-lovers7 (Taisuke Goto); installs from the original repository.

plugins.name: compact-plus
plugins.description: Checkpoint + Recovery layers — transcript backup, 10-section state capture before compaction, and recovery guidance injection after it. By u-ichi (Yuichi Uemura); installs unmodified from the author's original repository — all credit upstream.

plugins.name: ascs
plugins.description: Read-only stack doctor (/ascs:doctor): reports which ASCS layers are active in this environment and checks the single-compact-decider rule. Registers no injecting hooks, writes nothing, calls no API.
